form.formComment: Last start 11th of 13 at Trentham on March 28 over 1200m, slow going 4.5 len behind Lady Iris carrying 57kg at $21.30. Before that came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 8 at this track on March 18 over 1200m, 2 len behind Legally Binding with 54.5kg at $12.40. Can turn things around.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up won by 1.3 len at Tauranga February 5 over 1200m on a soft track defeating Poster Boy with 58kg at $4.80. Second run from a spell didn't do much in the run home; 10th of 12 at Tauranga on March 14 over 1400m, in the wet; 10 len behind Unwritten carrying 57.5kg at $20.30. Keep safe.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 8th of 11 at Hawera on March 25 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind London carrying 58.5kg at $25.60. form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.3 len at this track March 18 over 1400m defeating Tears Of Victory carrying 58kg at $2.10. Before that 2nd of 13 at Te Aroha on March 6 over 1400m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Berenhard carrying 58kg at $3.90. Big chance to make it back-to-back successes.
